title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, push, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; identical API surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) that talks to the local Ollama API; chat, multi-model, RAG, user auth.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints with POJO models and async support.

title: ollamapy
summary: Lightweight community Python wrapper (pre official SDK) – still useful for quick scripts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI toolbox (chat, batch benchmark, model management) written in Go.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic client for Ollama with concurrent streaming and ActiveRecord-like syntax.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal React chatbot component that consumes Ollama’s streaming endpoint; drop-in for any site.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of compose stacks bundling Ollama with Open-WebUI, Postgres, QDrant, and nginx for easy local RAG.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed requests/responses and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Streamlit app demonstrating local RAG using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that answers prompts via Ollama; supports slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama server and CLI, enabling reproducible deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for Q&A, summarization, and note generation using local models.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instance with Ollama server and optional public UI.
